_README: Team charter registry. `tails` = dedicated charter aircraft N-numbers (e.g. DET's N313TR). `callsigns` = flight numbers for pooled charters where the airframe rotates per trip (e.g. DL8884 for NYY on Delta's VIP 757 pool, UA3782 for LAD on United's 737 MAX pool). Sources: airliners.net 2025/2026 MLB charters threads, FlyerTalk, individual X/Twitter spotter sightings, AirlineGeeks. Recheck each season — Delta's DL88xx block and United's UA37xx block shift annually. HOU uses a private Fertitta-owned 767 (N625HR) rather than a pooled Delta charter — no standard callsign. TOR: Air Canada (Jetz) is the charter operator despite WestJet being the marketing sponsor; 2026 airliners.net thread lists IATA flight AC7031. 2026 changes (per airliners.net 2026 MLB charters thread): New Pacific Airlines (RVF) ceased operations/filed Ch.7 in Nov 2025, so ATH returned to the Dallas Mavericks' Boeing 757 (N801DM, operated by MLW Air) and TEX switched to American Airlines (AA9734); WSH left American Airlines (old, now-defunct AA9721) for Delta (DL8892). DET: Olympia Aviation LLC (ICAO: DRW) operates N313TR; exact filed flight number unconfirmed in public spotter sources.

ARI.name: Arizona Diamondbacks
ARI.notes: Delta pooled VIP 757 fleet (~11 airframes rotate per trip) — no dedicated tail, so tails stays empty by design. DL8876 confirmed current (airliners.net 2024 thread + Sep 2024 spotter photo of a DL8876 757-200). AeroDataBox may only index this charter under its ICAO callsign DAL8876 rather than IATA DL8876; routes/flights.js retries the ICAO form when the IATA lookup is empty. Recheck the DL88xx block each season.

ATH.name: Athletics
ATH.notes: New Pacific Airlines (RVF) ceased ops Nov 2025; for 2026 the A's fly the Dallas Mavericks' Boeing 757-200 (N801DM, operated by MLW Air) per airliners.net 2026 charter thread. Track via tail N801DM.

DET.name: Detroit Tigers
DET.notes: Olympia Aviation LLC (ICAO: DRW) — exact filed flight number unconfirmed; AeroDataBox may resolve via tail N313TR directly

HOU.name: Houston Astros
HOU.notes: Private Fertitta-owned Boeing 767-300ER; not a pooled Delta charter — no standard DAL8xxx callsign. Track via tail N625HR.

TEX.name: Texas Rangers
TEX.notes: New Pacific Airlines (RVF) ceased ops Nov 2025; for 2026 the Rangers fly American Airlines (their official airline, HQ'd at DFW). Callsign AA9734 per airliners.net 2026 charter thread — lower confidence, reverify once season is underway.

TOR.name: Toronto Blue Jays
TOR.notes: Air Canada (Jetz) operates despite WestJet being marketing sponsor; A320-200 ~70 all-business-class seats. 2026 airliners.net thread lists IATA form AC7031 (was ACA7031/ICAO); if AeroDataBox fails to resolve, revert to ACA7031.

WSH.name: Washington Nationals
WSH.notes: Moved from American Airlines (old AA9721, no longer a valid charter — confirmed dead on FlightRadar) to Delta for 2026 per airliners.net 2026 charter thread.
